import string
import core.sys
import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    else if b == 45 and not has_digit
      sign = -1
    else
      if has_digit
        if count < 2
          nums = __list_int_set(nums, count, current * sign)
          count = count + 1
        end
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
        sign = 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit and count < 2
    nums = __list_int_set(nums, count, current * sign)
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count < 2
    sys.exit(1)
  end
  let a = match nums.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b = match nums.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end
